channel.title: Amazon on Villa de Tara
channel.description: Recent content in Amazon on Villa de Tara

item.title: A Tale of Two Deliveries
item.description: We ordered some items at the IKEA order and delivery facility in Chania a couple of weeks ago. We chose delivery (in two to three weeks) because the main piece (a day bed for the study/third bedroom) wouldn’t fit in the car. I also ordered bathroom items from the Amazon German marketplace last Sunday with a delivery date of Tuesday 25 July. On Monday, I received a call from Delatolas Express Cargo telling me my IKEA delivery would be on Thursday.
